worldData.instructions:
A boat and the sea, coupled both ways: the swell heaves the hull; the hull carves its wake into the water.
No controls. Watch it cross.

stepHooks.author: fable
stepHooks.description: SAIL: CPU wave function (gnoise port) → boat heave/pitch; boat position → GPU wake. One clock on the whiteboard.

visualTypes.name: sl_world
